ref-cairo-1932.title: Cairo Congress of Arab Music (1932)
ref-cairo-1932.notes: Foundational reference for early modern institutional discussions of Arab music theory, maqam classification, tuning, notation, and performance practice.

ref-mishaqa.title: Al-Risala al-Shihabiyya fi al-Sina'a al-Musiqiyya
ref-mishaqa.author: Mikhail Mishaqa
ref-mishaqa.public_label: Mikhail Mishaqa, Al-Risala al-Shihabiyya fi al-Sina'a al-Musiqiyya
ref-mishaqa.notes: Historical theoretical source used for interval theory, octave division, and early modern Arab music theory.

ref-inside-arabic-music.title: Inside Arabic Music: Arabic Maqam Performance and Theory in the 20th Century
ref-inside-arabic-music.author: Johnny Farraj and Sami Abu Shumays
ref-inside-arabic-music.public_label: Johnny Farraj and Sami Abu Shumays, Inside Arabic Music
ref-inside-arabic-music.notes: Primary modern practical-theoretical reference for maqam families, ajnas, sayr, modulation, notation, and performance practice.

ref-touma.title: The Music of the Arabs
ref-touma.author: Habib Hassan Touma
ref-touma.public_label: Habib Hassan Touma, The Music of the Arabs
ref-touma.notes: Scholarly overview used for historical, aesthetic, and structural framing of Arab music and maqam.
